title: Sphaeralcea umbellata
intro: Sphaeralcea umbellata, commonly known as the Globemallow, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae), native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Sphaeralcea umbellata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, particularly sphaerol and umbellatol, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Sphaeralcea umbellata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
taxonomy: Sphaeralcea umbellata is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to North America and is commonly known as the desert marigold. This plant is classified as a member of the genus Sphaeralcea, which is a group of plants that are often referred to as globemallows. The genus Sphaeralcea is part of the larger family Malvaceae, which includes over 200 genera of flowering plants. Sphaeralcea umbellata is also classified as a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seedling stage.
uses: Sphaeralcea umbellata, also known as the globed globemallow, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots may be used to create infusions and extracts that can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Some research suggests that Sphaeralcea umbellata may possess antimicrobial properties, which could help prevent infection in minor cuts and scrapes. However, more studies are needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal potential and its effects on human health. Further research and clinical trials are necessary to confirm the efficacy of Sphaeralcea umbellata in treating various medical conditions.

properties: Sphaeralcea umbellata, also known as the globemallow, is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for its therapeutic properties. The active constituents of Sphaeralcea umbellata include flavonoids, glycosides, and iridoids. side_effects: Sphaeralcea umbellata, commonly known as the globemallow, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
